turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that's me. What can I help with?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can help with general questions about the clinic.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m trying to get an appointment for

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: patient cases, medication refills, and insurance.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: What would you like to do today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’d like to book a first appointment for my right knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: We'd like to schedule your first visit for your Right Me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm, is this your first time visiting our clinic?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: So, my knee started aching a few weeks ago after a run. It’s on the inside, clicks when I bend it, and feels like it might give out going down stairs.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a specific provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m open to first available, yeah.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are no openings for a new patient consultation this week.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to look for the next available appointment after July 6th?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that works. What’s open right after the 6th?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The first openings are on Thursday, July 9th with Dewey Hauser.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would any of those work for you?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your first appointment for your right knee is set for Thursday, July 9th at 1245 p.m. with Dr. Judy Hauser at Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: a list of your current medications.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like a text with these details?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You'll get a text with your appointment details soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, I think that covers it. Thanks a lot.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: We look forward to seeing you.
